category_sources: Official X.Org repository and documentation identify twm as an X.Org app/window manager.
source_facts.description says it is the Tab Window Manager for the X Window System.
display_name_sources: Official X.Org GitLab project path is xorg/app/twm.
docs_sources: Official X.Org archived twm manual page documents the command behavior.
Official X.Org documentation index links protocol documentation and manual pages.
repo_sources: X.Org documentation references freedesktop GitLab as the code-management system.
source_facts.homepage points to the official X.Org GitLab repository.
tags_sources: Official X.Org project location and documentation place it in the X.Org app stack.
source_facts.description identifies the X Window System Tab Window Manager.
